creator: drr.backup@gmail.com
text:
To add some additional info:
I have installed the libreoffice binary package with pkg, but others in the Forum report that compiling from ports also results in the same issue. I have also tried a force reinstall on real hardware, and a fresh install on a vm, both giving the same results.
Incidentally, on an XFCE desktop with 'qtct', libreoffice seems to correctly use the theme applied through qtct.
